Design built to scale.

We build brands and digital products for companies
ready to grow. No generalists. No templates. Just systems
that work at scale.

Selected Work

What We've Built

All Projects →

What We Do

Our Services

Full Services →
01
WebCanvas

Digital Design

Web, app, UI, and UX design. Intuitive digital experiences that captivate audiences and perform at every touchpoint.

02
CX&Identity

Branding & Identity

Logo, brand identity, and packaging design. A strong, recognisable presence that resonates with your audience and lasts.

03
CMF_Nexus

Product Design

From concept sketch and CAD to prototyping and production-ready files. Design meets engineering precision.

04
Lumina.raw

Photo & Video

Photography, videography, and editing. Visuals that tell your brand story and stop the scroll.

How We Work

Our Process

01

Understand

Deep research. Client interviews. Market mapping. We never design blind.

02

Design

Strategic concepts, iteration, and refinement until we hit something true.

03

Build

Production-ready files, handoff docs, and implementation support.

04

Scale

Systems that grow with your company. Retainers for ongoing partnership.

See Full Process →

Beyond Projects

Our Programs

Explore Programs →

Creative Department

Our flagship retainer — embedded design support for businesses that need design ongoing, not one-off.

Learn More →

Design Lab

Research and discovery for complex, high-demand design challenges before execution begins.

Learn More →

off_menu

Bespoke, tailor-made packages for clients whose needs don't fit a standard scope.

Learn More →

Field Notes

Our platform for discourse with designers, artisans, and industry experts.

Learn More →

Field Notes

Thinking from the studio, occasionally.

No pitch. Just the work we find worth writing about.

Let's build something together.
